name: Chez Imim
description: This is a charming local spot just opposite the Mosque Talborjt. Very local-lots of locals drinking tea and coffee at any given time and fantastic local cuisine (tajines and fish dishes and cous cous). The owner/ manager really did everything to make us welcome including giving me (the woman of the couple) roses to take home! We went twice and enjoyed delicious French Onion Soup, Calamari (excellent), Fish on the bone , lamb tajine , cous cous, oranges and cinnamon desserts...great tea and proper coffee too! No alcohol but when the menu du jour is a 3 course meal for 5 euros, who cares?! Loved Agadir and discovering places like this with such a warm welcome made it the more special.

description: Où savourez un bon tagine dans une ambiance et un décor typiquement marocain au cœur de la ville ? La réponse était « nulle part » jusqu'à l'ouverture de Dar Tagine ! name: Cafe Restaurant Le Panoramic
description: Welcome to Panoramic Restaurant, located in the beautiful Paradise Valley in Agadir, just 40 km away from the city center. Situated on a scenic mountain top, our restaurant offers breathtaking views of the majestic Big Atlas mountains. At Panoramic Restaurant, we pride ourselves on providing our guests with an unforgettable dining experience. Our skilled chefs are experts in preparing delicious Moroccan cuisine using only the freshest and highest quality ingredients. From savory tagines to succulent grilled meats, our menu is sure to tantalize your taste buds. But that's not all - we also offer our guests the opportunity to take home some of the finest honey produced in the region. Our honey stand showcases a variety of flavors and textures, all of which are harvested locally and sustainably. So whether you're in the mood for a delicious meal or looking for some locally sourced honey, come visit us at Panoramic Restaurant. Our friendly staff and stunning views are sure to leave you with lasting memories.

description: Plongez dans l'univers enchanteur du Maestro Cabaret, le cabaret de luxe le plus prisé d'Agadir. Le Maestro Cabaret est le lieu de prédilection des meilleurs chanteurs, tant locaux qu'internationaux. Chaque spectacle est un véritable chef-d'œuvre artistique, combinant voix envoûtantes, performances de danse captivantes et une scénographie éblouissante. C'est ici que les talents les plus brillants viennent illuminer vos soirées avec des prestations qui marquent les esprits. Grâce à sa popularité, le Maestro Cabaret est toujours complet. Il est fortement recommandé de réserver à l'avance pour vous assurer une place dans cet établissement prestigieux.
